UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile containing roles, selected aesthetics, and contact details.

userId.description: The unique Firebase Auth User ID.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

role.description: The professional role of the user.

workplaceType.description: Type of organization where the user works.

aesthetics.description: Primary fashion aesthetics chosen by the user.

createdAt.description: Server timestamp when the profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Server timestamp when the profile was last updated.

UserDesign.title: UserDesign
UserDesign.description: Generative designs generated and saved by a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns the design.

prompt.description: The descriptive text prompt used for generative generation.

tags.description: Derived categories of the design based on material and prompt.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this design was generated and saved.

Favorite.title: Favorite
Favorite.description: Designs favorited by a user from the community gallery.

id.description: Unique identifier of the favorite (usually user_uid + _ + designId).

userId.description: The ID of the user who favorited the design.

designId.description: The ID of the favorited community design.

authorName.description: The name of the original author.

authorEmail.description: The email of the original author.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this item was favorited.

users.description: A collection storing individual user accounts, preferences, and workspace settings.

designs.description: A collection containing saved design assets generated within the studio.

favorites.description: A collection of favorited community designs saved by users.
